arts.ttl: Manchester City’s bluntness against Inter may give Arteta’s Arsenal ideas
arts.sum: Italian side’s low block stifled Pep Guardiola’s men and offered reminders of March’s Premier League stalemate Pep Guardiola had made the decision. The Manchester City manager had known for five or 10 minutes and so when the half-time whistle sounded in Wednesday night’s Champions League tie against Inter at the Etihad Stadium, he sprinted off to the dressing room, eager to put the plan in place. It is a major part of Guardiola’s greatness. The ability to see when and where things are going awry; to make the needed changes. Here, there was not much going right. City were blocked up, unable to find fluency or incisiveness. There was an unusual kind of vulnerability about them. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal offered surprise positive Martin Odegaard injury update before Man City
arts.sum: Odegaard picked up ankle ligament damage during Norway's match with Austria in the Nations League. Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard may not be out for as long as Mikel Arteta fears as the Gunners prepare for the challenges of Atalanta and Manchester City this week.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal starlet charged with attempted drug smuggling through Stansted airport
arts.sum: The attacker formerly played with Aberdeen and is currently with Greenock Morton in Scotland

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal player arrested for drug smuggling
arts.sum: British footballer Jay Emmanuel-Thomas has been charged in connection with trying to smuggle cannabis worth £600,000 ($800,000) through a British airport.

arts.ttl: Jorginho identifies 'talented' Arsenal star who could fill Martin Odegaard void
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard is set for an extended spell on the sidelines but Jorginho believes a young academy star can successfully take his place in the Gunners' line-up

arts.ttl: Nine players could miss Man City vs Arsenal clash after Kevin De Bruyne injury scare
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is Manchester City's latest injury concern after being subbed at half-time with an issue against Inter in the Champions League with Arsenal also without a number of stars

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal player arrested over importing more than $700,000 worth of cannabis
arts.sum: Sky News report that the former Arsenal player was detained on suspicion of orchestrating the attempted import of cannabis from Thailand through Stansted Airport. Professional footballer Jay Emmanuel-Thomas was arrested by National Crime Agency officers on Wednesday morning in a drugs operation worth close to $800,000 (£600,000) .

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan reveals Arsenal hope amid Man City FFP charges fear
arts.sum: Former Crystal Palace chairman and talkSPORT host Simon Jordan has expressed his hope that Arsenal will be victorious over Manchester City on Sunday but not due to the club's current Financial Fair Play (FFP) hearing. In February 2023, the Premier League charged City with 115 breaches of FFP rules.

arts.ttl: Arsenal add 41 players to Champions League squad list ahead of Atalanta game
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has added 41 players to his squad list for tonight's Champions League opener against Atalanta. Among those named on the B List are Ethan Nwaneri and Myles Lewis-Skelly who have become integrated members of the first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: 14-year-old wonderkid breaks European record
arts.sum: He made his debut for Arsenal's Under-18s last year when he was 13 years old, being developed by academy head coach Jack Wilshere. 14-year-old Arsenal wonderkid breaks European record
